base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemies_towns_npcs_batch — a character (boss) from 1994 earthbound. Remaining ~100 sheets cover all enemies (Retro Hippie/Starman/Mr. Saturn/Slimy Pile/Giygas/Pokey/Runaway Dog/Sentry Robot/etc.) + all towns + all dungeons + NPCs (Mr. T clone/Tessie/Blue Blue Gang/Happy Happy Cult/etc.). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Remaining ~100 sheets cover all enemies (Retro Hippie/Starman/Mr. Saturn/Slimy Pile/Giygas/Pokey/Runaway Dog/Sentry Robot/etc.) + all towns + all dungeons + NPCs (Mr. T clone/Tessie/Blue Blue Gang/Happy Happy Cult/etc.)
